title: exteroception
body: self monitoring using external systems built around Zo

title: Thread Idea: Are we outrunning the models? AI training lag and cultural resurgence.
Hiring meta — what it is & how I uncovered it
body: Uncovered through A/B outreach tests, network-mapping of amplifiers, and interviews. Quick wins: 1) write a 1-sentence hiring story; 2) activate 3–5 amplifiers before posting; 3) use warm DM from mutual contact.

title: Zo Good - Article idea for first week using Zo
Zo Learning Journey Thread - Daily learnings and takeaways from using Zo
Data Supremacy & Provenance Rant
body: Rant about how everyone is using the same data. The long-term edge isn't the model—it's data supremacy and provenance (knowing exactly where high-signal data came from and owning it).
